name: [GRV-API] Django View Performance Monitor
message:
Django view performance degradation detected.

View: {{django.view}}
Method: {{http.method}}
P95 Duration: {{trace.django.view.duration.p95}}ms
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}

View Performance Impact:
- High view response times affecting user experience
- May indicate inefficient business logic
- Potential bottlenecks in view processing

Investigation Steps:
1. Check view performance: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources/{{django.view}}?env=prod
2. Review view code for optimization opportunities
3. Check database queries within the view
4. Analyze template rendering performance
5. Consider caching strategies

View Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources/{{django.view}}?env=prod

options.escalation_message: Django view performance continues to degrade. User experience significantly impacted.
